text:
Author: wen

Log:
  - Update to 1.0.7
  - Update LICENSE

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/py-geojson/Makefile
  head/devel/py-geojson/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/py-geojson/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-geojson/Makefile	Fri May  2 07:30:35 2014	(r352777)
+++ head/devel/py-geojson/Makefile	Fri May  2 08:06:21 2014	(r352778)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	geojson
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.6
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.7
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	devel geography python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
@@ -12,7 +11,7 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	wen@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Python's Encoder/decoder for simple GIS features
 
-LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE=	BSD3CLAUSE
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}nose>=1.3.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-nose
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}simplejson>1.9:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-simplejson
